title: rubus infoecundus
side_effects: Rubus infoecundus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of anthocyanins. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive use of Rubus infoecundus can cause interactions with certain medications, resulting in adverse effects like dizziness and fatigue. Furthermore, using the plant in excessive amounts can also lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalance.
